rationale: Decomposition, provenance, and domain parity all hold at bc6d35d7. Chain A->B->C length 3 (within bound); A->B is a real edge (AC2 unblock is meaningless before AC1's block exists) and B->C conservative-but-real (docs name Bead-2's shipped schema/audit keys). The A/B scope overlap on gate.go/tally.go/complete-tests is SERIAL not parallel and justified (AC5 diff-review tractability against Bead-1's isolated diff + isolated review of the subtle step-4.75 durable-audit reorder); merge-into-one and split-Bead-1-by-package both correctly rejected. Each bead is one-round bead-panel verifiable and independently landable given the order. Every spec AC1-AC12 maps to a bead + a named runnable test; the AC8 (block in Bead1 / non-refutable in Bead2) and AC10 (predicate/re-assert/doc) splits are coherent; AC11+AC12 mapped. Domain parity clean: all touched code paths are workflow-owned per OWNERSHIP.yaml; internal/bead is read-only via completeMergeMetadataFn (no change lands); ADR/skill docs unowned-by-domain (fine). Grounding spot-checks (leg9 243-253, leg10 255-262, CompleteBead 669, the single Decision!=want at panel_test.go:254) all match. Sole gap is a non-blocking key_file_paths omission (below).

findings.detail: Bead 2 changes panelGate's return arity to (*panel.Registration, []panel.Refutation, error) (step 4). Repo-wide, panelGate is called from internal/complete/panel_advisory.go (def), complete.go (step 375), panel_gate_e2e_test.go, panel_advisory_test.go, AND panel_gate_layout_test.go:152,162. The last file (panel_gate_layout_test.go) needs mechanical `reg, _, err :=` updates but is NOT enumerated in Bead 2's key_file_paths. Consequence is nil in practice: it is compiler-enforced (the package won't build otherwise), the step-4 prose generically says 'the direct panelGate callers in tests', it is workflow-owned (no domain-parity impact), and beads are serial (no parallel-worktree conflict for an incomplete scope list to trigger). Recommend adding internal/complete/panel_gate_layout_test.go to Bead 2 key_file_paths for enumeration completeness; not a blocker.

plan.md line 50 states 'All line references below are pinned against HEAD fae2bfb6', but the branch under review is bc6d35d7. I verified the cited line ranges (gate.go:243-253/255-262, complete.go:669/695-708, panel_test.go:254) still resolve correctly at bc6d35d7, so the references are accurate despite the stale SHA label. Cosmetic; refresh the SHA in the plan header if convenient.

All touched paths verified workflow-owned per .mindspec/domains/workflow/OWNERSHIP.yaml: internal/panel/**, internal/complete/**, internal/instruct/**, cmd/**, plugins/mindspec/**, .claude/skills/**. The durable-audit write reuses the existing bead.MergeMetadata seam read-only; internal/bead (execution domain) receives no change. ADR-0037 + SKILL.md are docs, correctly unowned-by-domain. No cross-domain leak.
